cases.name: 合法完整配置直接复用
cases.reason: All frozen configuration inputs are equivalent.
cases.requiredAction: Reference the approved source configuration and preserve provenance.

cases.name: Blueprint 未变字段直接继承
cases.requiredAction: Retain source revision and field-level provenance.

cases.name: 同角色同节目仅增加人数
cases.reason: Only scale changed within frozen identity and structure.
cases.requiredAction: Validate size allocation, formation density, capacity, cost and lead time.

cases.name: LED 环境变化
cases.reason: Lighting environment changed while costume contracts remain frozen.
cases.requiredAction: Validate color shift, reflectance, camera capture and team recognition in target LED conditions.

cases.name: 场地变化
cases.reason: Venue-dependent visibility and production clearances require local evidence.
cases.requiredAction: Run venue-local production, safety and visual-integrity checks.

cases.name: 同色系小范围配色调整
cases.reason: Adjustment remains within inherited Phase 1 palette identity and ratios.
cases.requiredAction: Run color-card, lighting-response, camera and team-recognition checks.

cases.name: 薄纱参数变化需要人工审核
cases.reason: The change may affect translucency and motion without proven frozen-boundary equivalence.
cases.requiredAction: Human-review translucency, layering, motion trail, safety and three-direction consistency.

cases.name: 生产资料不完整
cases.reason: Production compatibility cannot be inferred from incomplete evidence.
cases.requiredAction: Production authority must recover and verify feasibility evidence.

cases.name: 动作幅度增加且证据不足
cases.reason: Existing structure has not been proven safe for the increased movement envelope.
cases.requiredAction: Perform movement and safety review; escalate if structural change is required.

cases.name: 未授权云肩全队混用
cases.reason: Cloud Collar authorization and role-priority boundaries are violated.
cases.requiredAction: Stop reuse and reopen Cloud Collar plus dependent Gates.

cases.name: Base Garment 改变
cases.requiredAction: Reopen Gate-01 and every dependent Gate; prohibit Blueprint inheritance.

cases.name: Material DNA 改变
cases.reason: A frozen Material DNA boundary changed.
cases.requiredAction: Reopen Gate-05 Material DNA and all downstream production and visual dependencies.

cases.name: 年龄段改变
cases.reason: Age identity and safety boundaries changed.
cases.requiredAction: Reopen age, role, structure, production and visual-integrity Gates.

cases.name: 节目类型改变
cases.reason: Program and movement compatibility boundaries changed.
cases.requiredAction: Reopen program compatibility and every movement-dependent Gate.

cases.name: 团队视觉识别改变
cases.requiredAction: Reopen palette, team composition, priority and visual-integrity Gates.

cases.name: 生产约束冲突需要审核
cases.reason: The approved production route is infeasible and substitution is not automatically allowed.
cases.requiredAction: Production authority must resolve feasibility; structural substitution escalates to full Gate revalidation.
